title: Marvel Mjolnir Mace
description: Changes The mace into Mjolnir in Minecraft
body:
⚡ Mjolnir – The Hammer of Thor (Mace Replacement Mod) ⚡

Unleash the power of the Norse god of thunder! This mod replaces the standard mace with Mjolnir, the legendary hammer of Thor. Wield the weapon of storms and command the fury of lightning as you crush your enemies with divine might.
